sglang.title: Expose no_stop_trim and skip_special_tokens in openai api
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Improve the type annotation for openai protocol
Expose no_stop_trim and skip_special_tokens in openai api

sglang.title: Offline LLM Engine Benchmark Throughput
sglang.author: zolinthecow
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#1865
Add throughput benchmark for engine.generate
Modifications
Added ability to specify an engine instead of an API url in the benchmarks
Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as neede

vllm.title: [ci][distributed] disable hanging tests
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: need to investigate, but i have seen several hang in the ci , e.g. https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci-aws/builds/11196#0193290b-cea7-43cf-b2d4-c4b3f10ff571

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Fix CPU CI online inference timeout
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix CPU test CI failed to start server for online inference

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Make shellcheck happy
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the INFO-level issues when running format.sh locally. cc @russellb
To avoid similar issues in the future, shellcheck.sh has been updated to fail CI when this happens.

vllm.title: Support Roberta embedding models
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds support for Roberta embedding models. It's mostly the same as the Bert architecture, the only thing that changes is the padding token in the Embedding layer so this PR tries to reuse Bert modeling classes as much as possible. For some of the models we also need head size 32, so this siz

vllm.title: [Perf] Reduce peak memory usage of llama
vllm.author: andoorve
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Maintaining multiple names here will cause both to be refcounted which increases the peak memory. This will manifest as more blocks on top of each other in the memory profile:

This change will increase the number of available blocks as a result of profiling especially with longer context lengths. I

vllm.title: [Bugfix] use AF_INET6 instead of AF_INET for OpenAI Compatible Server
vllm.author: jxpxxzj
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently the OpenAI Compatible Server creates a socket outside of vllm.entrypoints.launcher.serve_http, and this socket uses the socket.AF_INET address family. On machines with only IPv6 addresses, this limitation prevents the socket from being accessed externally.
I made a small modification, chan

vllm.title: [Tool parsing] Improve / correct mistral tool parsing
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is heavily inspired / copied from what @gcalmettes nicely summarized here: #9059 (comment) and in following messages. Thanks a ton for the nice investigation and great ideas of how to improve Mistral function calling.
Based on @gcalmettes's idea here #9059 (comment) both tekken models (mistr

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix unable to load some models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes more models broken by #10205 and/or #10304.
I have also added tests for check that each model can be initialized using dummy format.

vllm.title: [bugfix] Fix static asymmetric quantization case
vllm.author: ProExpertProg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR provides a complete fix for #10292. In the static quantization case, the AZP needs to be folded into azp_adj ahead of time.
FIX #10292

vllm.title: [Misc] Change RedundantReshapesPass and FusionPass logging from info to debug
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This log message is a little spammy -- looks like it prints out roughly once per layer per TP rank, so downgrading it to debug instead of info.
Log looks like this:
(VllmWorkerProcess pid=3178170) INFO 11-13 16:44:35 reshapes.py:56] Removed 0 no-op reshapes
(VllmWorkerProcess pid=3178171) INFO 11-13

vllm.title: [Model] Support Qwen2 embeddings and use tags to select model tests
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A newer version of #5611 and #6282 since the source repo has been archived.
FIX #5600
FIX #5827
FIX #6015
FIX #9761

vllm.title: [Bugfix]  Qwen-vl output is inconsistent in speculative decoding
vllm.author: skylee-01
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Qwen-vl uses speculative decoding and does not use speculative decoding to have inconsistent output. We tested ngram and medusa, and this situation exists. After investigation, we found that there was an error position_id, and further because the new seq_data was created during the batch_expansion p

vllm.title: [Misc] Consolidate pooler config overrides
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: To reduce the number of CLI parameters, this PR consolidates the arguments related to pooler config and cleans up related code.

vllm.title: [Build] skip renaming files for release wheels pipeline
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously all the wheels are named to v1.0.0.dev but this is not correct for published wheels during my release process. This PR

preserve the previous behavior for nightly
fix the naming for release tag

it would be useful to review the shell script
